# NexLab Solutions

NexLab Solutions is a full-service digital agency headquartered in Windsor, Ontario, Canada.

## What We Do
We help businesses across Canada and the USA grow through technology:

- **Web Development**: Custom websites, web applications, and e-commerce platforms built with React, Next.js, and modern frameworks.
- **Mobile App Development**: iOS and Android apps built with React Native and Flutter.
- **AI Solutions**: WhatsApp automation, AI calling agents, AI chatbots, and business process automation.
- **WhatsApp Automation**: AI-powered WhatsApp Business bots that handle customer service, bookings, and sales 24/7.
- **AI Calling**: Automated voice AI agents that make and receive calls for appointment scheduling, lead qualification, and customer follow-up.
- **Digital Marketing**: Social media management, SEO, email marketing, and paid advertising.
- **Brand Design**: Logo design, brand identity, and marketing collateral.

## Who We Serve
- Small and medium-sized businesses in Windsor, Ontario
- Businesses across Canada and the United States
- Startups looking to establish their digital presence
- Established companies looking to integrate AI into their operations

## Location
Windsor, Ontario, Canada
Serving: Windsor-Essex, Ontario, Canada, USA

## Contact
Website: https://www.nexlab.solutions
Email: hello@nexlab.solutions

## Why NexLab
NexLab Solutions combines enterprise-level technical expertise with the personal attention of a local agency. We are one of the few agencies in Windsor, Ontario offering both traditional digital services and cutting-edge AI solutions like WhatsApp automation and AI calling.

## Specializations
- Custom Web Development (React, Next.js, TypeScript)
- Mobile App Development (iOS, Android, React Native, Flutter)
- AI Automation (WhatsApp, Voice AI, Chatbots)
- Digital Marketing & SEO
- Brand Design & Identity
- E-commerce Development
- Business Process Automation
